source_description: Final workflow-stabilization mission for spec-kitty core. Closes the workflow-stabilization track by finishing four still-current issues (#454 stale test detection, #455 diff-coverage policy cleanup, #456 protected-branch linear-history support, #457 release prep automation) and verifying-or-closing two older recovery issues with substantial code already on main (#415 implementation crash recovery, #416 merge interruption recovery). Validated against fresh clone /tmp/spec-kitty-20260407-090957 at commit 7307389a1f529dae9e90279ea972609bb0b420aa.
